text: Managing blood loss is a critical component to thoracic surgery.
Eastern Time, watch a live webcast demonstrating the use of the Aquamantis system to control bleeding during a chest wall resection and a VAT Slobectomy.
Dr. Rodney Landreneau from the University of Pittsburgh Medical Center will share his perspective on the use of Medtronic Advanced Energy's Transcolation technology to achieve hemostasis.
Viewers of this program are urged to email questions to Dr. Landrino during the webcast for discussion.
